title: Phase 4 Consolidated Technical Reference Library
authority: Approved flows and decisions, with explicitly marked provisional technical baselines

families.title: API, Socket and OpenAPI Reference
families.description: One implementation reference for REST endpoints, socket events, provider callbacks and worker queues. Records are independently linkable; unresolved shapes are explicit blockers rather than implied permission to guess.

families.title: Data Model Reference
families.description: A business-first catalogue of models, enums, ownership, privacy and schema readiness. Conceptual records and executable Prisma baselines are clearly distinguished.

families.title: Platform Architecture and Operations
families.description: Architecture, infrastructure, providers, cost controls, disaster recovery and incident runbooks in one role-filtered reference.

families.title: Screen-to-Feature Reference
families.description: A corrected, searchable map of shared, Task Owner, Tasker and Admin screens. Each record states purpose, dependencies, safety rules and unresolved design evidence.

editRule: Edit the four JSON family sources after bootstrap; do not rerun this migration script for normal changes.
